prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, moonlit night. Elara Vane in layered blue robes with floating spell tags points toward a flickering magical rune on a wall, her expression focused. Haru Silverbrook, dressed in a formal cloak with a ribboned notebook, stands close by, observing the disturbance with a composed, diligent expression. High-quality anime style, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the Japanese fantasy guild dormitory. Haru Silverbrook steps forward, opening her master ledger to cast a stabilizing seal over the flickering rune. Elara Vane shifts her position, holding her ancient spellbook open to channel energy, as their combined efforts cause the flickering light to settle into a steady, soft glow. Consistent character appearance and camera, no text, no watermark.
